response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack engineering experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with current hands-on work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) directly matching the role. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent), proven architecture/DevOps skills, and active contributions to testing culture (TDD, workshops, custom test runner) align well with the stack and qualifications. Minor gaps: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, and Kotlin is absent, but the overall depth and adaptability make this a strong interview candidate.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience across TS/Node/React with current AI-agent/MCP work
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, built own test runner, ran workshops)
Polyglot engineer comfortable across cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, Mongo, SQL
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in primary stack
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older (pre-2018)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate less recent depth in modern TS ecosystems
